name: IdsDrugRvrslBuild

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT A02_CLM.CLM_SK,A02_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,A02_CLM.CLM_ID,A08_CLM.CLM_SK,A08_CLM.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ_DRVR, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM A02_DRUG_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM A08_DRUG_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM A02_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM A08_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP1, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP2 WHERE ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD IN ('MEDIMPACT') AND ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = A08_DRUG_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND ADJ_DRVR.DRUG_CLM_SK = A08_DRUG_CLM.DRUG_CLM_SK AND ADJ_DRVR.DRUG_CLM_SK = A08_CLM.CLM_SK AND A08_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP2.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MAP2.TRGT_CD = 'A08' AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO)) AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.RFL_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.RFL_NO)) AND A08_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK = A02_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK AND A08_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK = A02_CLM.SVC_STRT_DT_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_CLM.SUB_ID)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_CLM.SUB_ID)) AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO)) AND ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = A02_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND A08_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK <> A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK AND A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK = A02_CLM.CLM_SK AND A02_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP1.CD_MPPNG_SK AND SUBSTRING(ADJ_DRVR.CLM_ID, 1, LEN(ADJ_DRVR.CLM_ID)-1) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_CLM.CLM_ID)) AND MAP1.TRGT_CD IN ('A02','A09') UNION SELECT A02_CLM.CLM_SK,A02_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,A02_CLM.CLM_ID,A08_CLM.CLM_SK,A08_CLM.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ_DRVR, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM A02_DRUG_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM A08_DRUG_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM A02_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM A08_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP1, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP2 WHERE ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD IN ('OPTUMRX') AND ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = A08_DRUG_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND ADJ_DRVR.DRUG_CLM_SK = A08_DRUG_CLM.DRUG_CLM_SK AND ADJ_DRVR.DRUG_CLM_SK = A08_CLM.CLM_SK AND A08_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP2.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MAP2.TRGT_CD = 'A08' AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO)) AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.RFL_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.RFL_NO)) AND A08_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK = A02_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK AND A08_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK = A02_CLM.SVC_STRT_DT_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_CLM.SUB_ID)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_CLM.SUB_ID)) AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO)) AND ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = A02_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND A08_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK <> A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK AND A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK = A02_CLM.CLM_SK AND A02_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP1.CD_MPPNG_SK AND SUBSTRING(ADJ_DRVR.CLM_ID, 1, LEN(ADJ_DRVR.CLM_ID)-1) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_CLM.CLM_ID)) AND MAP1.TRGT_CD IN ('A02','A09') UNION SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM D WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'PCS' AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND ADJ.RX_NO = D.RX_NO AND ADJ.FILL_DT_SK = D.FILL_DT_SK AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK UNION SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM D WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'WELLDYNERX' AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(D.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK UNION SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM D WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'MEDTRAK' AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(D.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK UNION SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM D WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'BCBSSC' AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(D.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK UNION SELECT A02_CLM.CLM_SK,A02_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,A02_CLM.CLM_ID,A08_CLM.CLM_SK,A08_CLM.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ_DRVR, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM A02_DRUG_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM A08_DRUG_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM A02_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM A08_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP1, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP2 WHERE ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD IN ('ESI') AND ADJ_DRVR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = A08_DRUG_CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND ADJ_DRVR.DRUG_CLM_SK = A08_DRUG_CLM.DRUG_CLM_SK AND A08_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK = A08_CLM.CLM_SK AND A08_CLM.PAYMT_REF_ID <> 'NA' AND A08_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP2.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MAP2.TRGT_CD = 'A08' AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND RTRIM(LTRIM(A08_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(A02_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO)) AND A08_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK = A02_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK AND A08_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK <> A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK AND A08_CLM.SUB_ID = A02_CLM.SUB_ID AND A08_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO = A02_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO AND A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK = A02_CLM.CLM_SK AND A02_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP1.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MAP1.TRGT_CD = 'A02' AND A02_CLM.ADJ_TO_CLM_ID = 'NA' AND ((A02_CLM.RCVD_DT_SK < A08_CLM.RCVD_DT_SK) OR (A02_CLM.RCVD_DT_SK = A08_CLM.RCVD_DT_SK AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.CLM_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM NO_PRIOR_A02_DRUG_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MAP3 WHERE NO_PRIOR_A02_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO = A08_DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_NO AND NO_PRIOR_A02_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO = A08_DRUG_CLM.RX_NO AND NO_PRIOR_A02_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK = A08_DRUG_CLM.FILL_DT_SK AND NO_PRIOR_A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK <> A08_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK AND NO_PRIOR_A02_DRUG_CLM.CLM_SK = NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.CLM_SK AND NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.SUB_ID = A08_CLM.SUB_ID AND NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO = A08_CLM.MBR_SFX_NO AND NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP3.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MAP3.TRGT_CD = 'A02' AND NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.ADJ_TO_CLM_ID = 'NA' AND NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.CLM_SK <> A02_CLM.CLM_SK AND NO_PRIOR_A02_CLM.RCVD_DT_SK < A02_CLM.RCVD_DT_SK))) ) UNION SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM D WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'SAVRX' AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(D.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK UNION SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM D WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'LDI' AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(D.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK UNION SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DRUG_CLM D WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'CVS' AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND RTRIM(LTRIM(ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(D.VNDR_CLM_NO)) AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 
COPYRIGHT 2008 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

DESCRIPTION:     Build P_CLM_RVRSL to use in IdsDrugReversal

PROCESSING: build file with adjusted to and adjusted from ids for reversals to use in IdsDrugReversal. associate the reversal claim with the original claim

OUTPUTS:  W_CLM_RVRSL used in IdsDrugReversal
MODIFICATIONS:
            BJ Luce               2005/05           originally programmed
            Steph Goddard    2006/04/17     changed where statement to cast fill_dt to match fill_dt_sk 
            Brent Leland        2006-04-20      Change DB2 insert to sequential file.
                                                                Changed parameters to envrionment values.
MODIFICATIONS:
Developer         Date               Project/Altiris #      Change Description                                                                    Development Project          Code Reviewer           Date Reviewed
------------------       ----------------       ------------------------      -----------------------------------------------------------------------                             --------------------------------       -------------------------------   ----------------------------       
Sandrew          2008-10-03       3784(PBM)           Added extraction criteria to include ESI drug claims                     devlIDSnew                    Steph Goddard          10/28/2008
KNeelam         2010-12-21        4616                    Added extraction criteria for new source MEDTRAK                    IntegrateNewDevl          Steph Goddard          12/23/2010
KNeelam         2012-01-17        4784                    Added extraction criteria for new source BCBSSC                        IntegrateCurDevl            Brent Leland               02-09-2012
SAndrew         2014-07-21        ServiceNowINC0107293                                                                                                                                   Kalyan Neelam          2014-09-08
The ESI data has changed due to Anchor to F14 ESI System conversion.    The input file.field ESI_ADJ_REF_NO is mapped to the IDS.DRUG_CLM.VNDR_CLM_ID.  This used to be unquie for every claim and its finacial adjustments.   Example, f a claim was entered into ESI System, it received value of 100 for ESI_ADJ_REF_NO.   If they adjusted the claim, they would send the same claim, with same ESI_ADJ_REF_NO but the claim would have a different claim status.   Then if ESI decided to then pay the claim again (they corrected Deduct Amt, COB Amounts, the member ended up purchasing the claim after the first filled version was shelved while waiting fo rmember to pick up and then ultimiately purchased the drug, the claim data would be sent with a diffrent ESI_ADJ_REF_NO.  This is important to understand becuase the ESI_ADJ_REF_NO -> DRUG_CLM.CLM_VNDR_NO was used to tie the IDS.CLM.ESI.CLM_ID"R" of A08  back to the original claim IDS.CLM.ESI.CLM of A02 that it was to adjust.
Now ESI is populating the  ESI_ADJ_REF_NO with the same value for every tweek to the claim.   There needed to be a business rule updates made in order to identify the origina claim, the IDS.CLM.ESI.CLM of A02, the Adjusting claim record is to negate out, the IDS.CLM.ESI.CLM_ID"R" of A08.   The criteria used to only be:
                                                                                     UNION
                                                                                     SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID
                                                                                     FROM   #$IDSOwner#.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ,   #$IDSOwner#.DRUG_CLM        D,    #$IDSOwner#.CLM                    ORIG_CLM,  #$IDSOwner#.CLM                    ADJ_CLM,  #$IDSOwner#.CD_MPPNG       MAP1
                                                                                     WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'ESI'
                                                                                            AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK 
                                                                                           AND ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO = D.VNDR_CLM_NO
                                                                                           AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK
                                                                                           AND ADJ.CLM_SK = ADJ_CLM.CLM_SK
                                                                                           AND D.CLM_SK   = ORIG_CLM.CLM_SK
Then it became 
                                                                                     UNION
                                                                                     SELECT D.CLM_SK,ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK,D.CLM_ID,ADJ.CLM_SK,ADJ.CLM_ID
                                                                                     FROM   #$IDSOwner#.W_DRUG_CLM ADJ,   #$IDSOwner#.DRUG_CLM        D,   #$IDSOwner#.CLM                    ORIG_CLM,   #$IDSOwner#.CLM                    ADJ_CLM,   #$IDSOwner#.CD_MPPNG       MAP1
                                                                                     WHERE ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD = 'ESI'
                                                                                            AND ADJ.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK 
                                                                                           AND ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO = D.VNDR_CLM_NO
                                                                                           AND ADJ.CLM_SK <> D.CLM_SK
                                                                                           AND ADJ.CLM_SK = ADJ_CLM.CLM_SK
                                                                                           AND D.CLM_SK   = ORIG_CLM.CLM_SK
                                                                                           AND ADJ_CLM.PAYMT_REF_ID > ORIG_CLM.PAYMT_REF_ID
                                                                                           AND ORIG_CLM.CLM_STTUS_CD_SK = MAP1.CD_MPPNG_SK
                                                                                           AND MAP1.TRGT_CD='A02'
                                                                                           AND ORIG_CLM.PAYMT_REF_ID = 
                                                                                                               (SELECT MAX( MAX_CLM.PAYMT_REF_ID) 
                                                                                                                FROM #$IDSOwner#.CLM MAX_CLM,    #$IDSOwner#.DRUG_CLM MAX_DRUG
                                                                                                               WHERE MAX_CLM.CLM_SK = MAX_DRUG.CLM_SK
                                                                                                                      AND MAX_DRUG.VNDR_CLM_NO =  ADJ.VNDR_CLM_NO
                                                                                                                      AND MAX_CLM.PAYMT_REF_ID < ADJ_CLM.PAYMT_REF_ID)
It now makes sure it looks for a paid claim with an A02 that was loaded to the system from a prior run before it looks at any A02 that was loaded as part of this batch run.   the key difference is the claims input date.


KapoorK               2018-01-24        5828              Added Query for SAVRX                                                                   IntegrateDev2                   Kalyan Neelam                                       2018-02-26 
KapoorK               2018-03-15        5828              Added Query for LDI                                                                         IntegrateDev2                   Jaideep Mankala                                    03/20/2018
KapoorK               2018-09-20        5828              Added Query for CVS                                                                        IntegrateDev2                   Kalyan Neelam                                       2018-10-01

Rekha Radhakrishna 2019-11-01    6131           Added Query for OPTUMRX                                                             IntegrateDev2                    KalyanNeelam                                        2019-11-20

Peter Gichiri               2020 -05-27    6131          Added the filter criteria 'A09'  to the OPTUMRX SQL                        IntegrateDev2             Jaideep Mankala                            05/29/2020      

Goutham Kalidindi     2020-10-22   US283560   Added Query for MEDIMPACT                                                           IntegrateDev2                    Kalyan Neelam                                       2020-11-03

Annotations:
W_DRUG_CLM table created in IdsDrugClmFkey job.
Used in IdsDrugReversal
OPTUMRX added to SQL
Pull original claim and drug claim paid data for adjusted claims
For IDS drug Claims: need to determine if the ClmR is for a claim in the input file or for a claim already loaded to IDS from a previous run.    If there is a claim on the IDS CLM table for the same person, drug, fill date AND that claim's status is A02 then the reversal is for that claim.   If there is no A02 claim on the IDS CLM table, then begin assuming the ClaimR is for a claim on the input file.   If the ClmR is for the claimon the input file, then they both should have the same Received Dt.
